title: Roasted Crisp Mediterranean Minari Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious pilaf dish featuring roasted minari, crunchy bonito flakes, and a hint of Mediterranean flair. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner or lunch option.

ingredients.name: Korean Minari
ingredients.amount: 1 bunch, cleaned and cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: Toss the minari with olive oil, red onion, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the minari is tender and slightly caramelized.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the bonito flakes and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until crispy and fragrant.
Add the roasted minari to the skillet and stir to combine with the bonito flakes.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the top and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
